plugins.name: adverant-nexus
plugins.description: Give Claude persistent memory, a skills marketplace, and multi-agent superpowers. Claude forgets everything between conversations — Nexus fixes that. Store memories in a GraphRAG knowledge graph that persists forever, discover and invoke 50+ reusable AI skills, synthesize new workflows by combining existing ones, manage documents with semantic search, and orchestrate multiple AI agents for complex tasks. 8 tools, 6 skills, 3 commands — one plugin.
